title: rhamnus californica subsp. crassifolia
intro: Rhamnus californica subsp. crassifolia, also known as California coffeeberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost immune function, and even exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. California coffeeberry can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
